metadata.description: Internet-native dream-adjacent aesthetics that originated on Tumblr/Reddit/TikTok 2018-2025. These aren't traditional symbols — they're whole visual moods modern users invoke when describing dreams ('this dream felt very weirdcore'). Powering video-prompt generation + symbol matching for Gen Z users.

core_imagery: swimming pools with water but no swimmers
stairwells that go on too long
places that should have people but don't
aesthetics.emotional_tone: uncanny familiarity, gentle dread, déjà vu, suspended time
aesthetics.camera_grammar: wide static shots, low-quality digital camera aesthetic, slight fish-eye, pov walking
aesthetics.dream_relevance: Most common Gen Z dream description: 'I was in a place I'd been before but it was empty and wrong.' Map this when user describes: empty institutional spaces, fluorescent light, no people in normally-busy places.
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: liminal space, empty fluorescent corridor, abandoned mall, 90s carpet, uncanny stillness, no people, slight fish-eye lens, harsh overhead lighting, beige and teal palette
aesthetics.ai_application: When user mentions empty hallway / abandoned mall / school at night → trigger liminal_space aesthetic in director.

core_imagery: fields of distorted-color grass under purple sky
playgrounds with eyes painted on the slides
houses with walls made of clouds
your childhood bedroom but the geometry is wrong
swimming pools with night sky reflected
aesthetics.lighting: soft glow, no clear light source, magic-hour everywhere
aesthetics.camera_grammar: low-fi vhs grain, dream-blur, slight chromatic aberration, 4:3 aspect
aesthetics.dream_relevance: When user describes: childhood places that feel slightly wrong, surreal-but-tender imagery, 'sunset that wouldn't end' — this is dreamcore.
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: dreamcore, pastel purple sky, surreal childhood imagery, soft glow, vhs grain, magic hour, oversized stuffed animals, melancholic surreal
aesthetics.ai_application: Dominant aesthetic for nostalgic/melancholy dreams featuring childhood imagery.

core_imagery: instructions in a language that's almost-English
doors that open onto more doors
low-resolution stock photo of grass with text
staircases drawn in a single point
aesthetics.camera_grammar: early-2000s low-res digital, raw cell phone screenshot energy, MS Paint annotations
aesthetics.dream_relevance: When dream feels surreal in a 'is this even a dream' way — text in dreams, instructions, signs that don't make sense, glitchy reality.
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: weirdcore, low-res digital, MS Paint annotations, oversaturated cyan red, JPEG artifacts, flat shadowless lighting, surreal text overlays
aesthetics.ai_application: Use for dreams with text/instructions/signs that don't make sense, glitch sensations.

core_imagery: kid's birthday party photos with text overlays of distress
old VHS family footage with disturbing captions
cake with fork stabbed in it
aesthetics.emotional_tone: repressed-childhood-pain made visible, dissociative, weaponized cuteness
aesthetics.lighting: harsh flash, overexposed, late-90s flash photography
aesthetics.camera_grammar: VHS color bleed, polaroid borders, MySpace-era webcam
aesthetics.dream_relevance: When users describe dreams of childhood-but-uncanny, returning to a young version of themselves with adult feelings. Sensitive territory — surface mental health resources.
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: traumacore, late-90s flash photography, pink bedroom with broken toys, VHS color bleed, polaroid borders, weaponized cuteness, overexposed
aesthetics.ai_application: DETECT and proactively offer therapist + IRT. Flag for content warning.

aesthetics.emotional_tone: joyful nostalgia, playground innocence, no irony
aesthetics.camera_grammar: 90s film camera grain, square format, child's-eye low angle
aesthetics.dream_relevance: Sweet childhood dreams, playground / cartoons / sticker stationery imagery.
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: kidcore, primary colors, Crayola scribbles, Lisa Frank rainbow, child's-eye perspective, 90s film grain, joyful playground

core_imagery: endless yellow office space with mono-fluorescent buzz
aesthetics.emotional_tone: trapped, scaling claustrophobia, slow dread, isolation
aesthetics.camera_grammar: VHS handycam, motion blur, wide-angle distortion
aesthetics.dream_relevance: Specific subgenre of liminal — when user describes feeling trapped in endless similar rooms, can't find exit. Often anxiety / trapped-in-life metaphor.
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: backrooms, endless yellow corridor, mono fluorescent buzz, stained carpet, VHS handycam, claustrophobic infinite space

aesthetics.emotional_tone: nostalgia for futures that never happened, ironic capitalism critique
aesthetics.dream_relevance: Specific to dreams with 80s/90s tech aesthetics, computer rooms, neon nostalgia, Tokyo nightscapes.
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: vaporwave, hot pink cyan purple, Roman bust sunglasses, 90s computer wireframe, purple grid, neon Tokyo, palm trees, VHS tracking

aesthetics.lighting: high-key flash photography, bedroom-lamp bedazzled glow
aesthetics.camera_grammar: early digital camera, 240p quality, tilt-shift selfie angle
aesthetics.dream_relevance: Dreams of teenage years for users born 1990-2005. Bedroom / mall / first AIM convo nostalgia.
Escapism dreams of slow rural life — read as need for rest from urban overstimulation.

aesthetics.emotional_tone: magical realism, hidden world inside the woods
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: fairycore, mushroom rings, moss stones, iridescent dragonfly, moonlit pond, magical hidden woods

aesthetics.dream_relevance: Dreams about being on the early internet, MSN convos, MySpace pages.

aesthetics.emotional_tone: intellectual obsession, gothic romance, academic melancholy
aesthetics.lighting: warm tungsten lamp, candle, single window beam
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: dark academia, leather-bound books, candlelit library, tweed, rain on windows, warm tungsten, autumn
cyberpunk, rain-soaked neon street, holographic ads, wet pavement reflection, Blade Runner Tokyo

core_imagery: Children's TV with eerie incidental music
VHS rentals from a shop that closed in 1989
aesthetics.emotional_tone: nostalgia for cancelled futures, unresolved past leaking into present
reference_works: Mark Fisher Ghosts of My Life
aesthetics.dream_relevance: Sophisticated dream-feeling: place-that-shouldn't-be, time-that-shouldn't-be. Often surfaces during user's mid-30s reckoning periods.

core_imagery: rooms that are bigger inside than outside
doors that lead to wrong rooms
stairs that don't end where they should
your house but a different floorplan
extra rooms you didn't know existed
aesthetics.emotional_tone: spatial wrongness, identity wrongness via place
aesthetics.dream_relevance: Common adult dream: discovering an extra room in your own house. Universally interpreted as discovering parts of self.
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: wrong-floorplan house, infinite stairs, room you didn't know existed, House of Leaves spatial wrongness

aesthetics.emotional_tone: comfortable focus, gentle solitude, productive cocooning
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: cafecore, rain on window, warm steam latte, lo-fi study girl, wooden cafe interior, golden lamplight

core_imagery: blurred dark figure in peripheral vision
you can see the room but cannot move
aesthetics.emotional_tone: primal terror, witnessed paralysis, uncanny presence
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: sleep paralysis demon, shadow figure on chest, hat man silhouette, dark doorway figure, paralyzed POV from bed
aesthetics.dream_relevance: Specific category — TikTok community has named these archetypes. Real medical phenomenon (hypnopompic hallucinations) + cultural meme. Surface explanatory content.

aesthetics.emotional_tone: cognitive distortion, body wrongness, looped delirium
aesthetics.video_prompt_keywords: fever dream, pulsing objects, crawling wallpaper, distorted hands, looped delirium, sickly yellow
